message:
Add VirtualTimerWheel for deterministic Lab runtime testing

Implement a timer wheel that operates on virtual ticks rather than
wall-clock time, enabling fully deterministic testing of async code.

Key features:
- Same tick always produces same timer expirations
- Deterministic expiration ordering via timer IDs (BinaryHeap)
- No wall-clock dependencies - pure virtual time
- VirtualTimerHandle for timer cancellation
- Methods: insert(), advance_to_next(), advance_by(), cancel()

This enables the Lab runtime to simulate time progression
predictably for property-based testing of async workflows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
